en:
On the other hand, a child evincing neurotic talent exaggerated by neurosis may be urged on by solicitous parents. How easy and tempting it would have been, e.g. in the present case, to admire, excite, and develop prematurely the child's eager desire for learning, and thereby develop an unnatural blasé state and a precociousness masking a neurosis! In such cases the parents must look after their own complexes and complex tendencies and not make capital out of them at the expense of the child. The idea should be dismissed once for all that children are to be held in bondage by their parents or that they are their toys. They are characteristic and new beings. In the matter of enlightenment on sexual things it can be affirmed that they suffer from the preconceived opinion that the truth is harmful. Many neurologists are of opinion that even in grown-ups enlightenment on their own psychosexual processes is harmful and even immoral. Would not the same persons perhaps refuse to admit the existence of the genitals themselves?

One should not, however, go from this extreme of prudishness to the opposite one, namely that of enlightenment à tout prix , which may turn out as foolish as it is disagreeable. In this matter I believe much discretion is advisable; still if children come upon an idea, they should be deceived no more than adults.

I hope, ladies and gentlemen, that I have shown you what complicated psychic processes psychoanalytic investigation reveals in the child, and how great is the significance of these processes for the mental health as well as for the general psychic development of the child. What I have been unable to show is the universal validity of these observations. Unfortunately, I am not in a position to demonstrate this, for I do not know myself how much of it is universally valid. Only by accumulation of such observations and further penetration into the problems broached shall we gain a complete insight into the laws of psychical development. It is to be regretted that we are at present still far from this goal. But I confidently hope that educators and practical psychologists, whether physicians or deep-thinking parents, will not leave us too long unassisted in this immensely important and interesting field.

Literature.

1. Freud. "Die Traumdeutung," II Auflage. Deuticke, Wien, 1909. 2. —— ——. "Sammlung kleiner Schriften zur Neurosenlehre," Band I & II. Deuticke, Wien. 3. —— ——. "Analyse der Phobie eines 5 jahrigen Knaben," Jahrbuch für Psychoanalytische u. Psychopathologische Forschungen , Band I. Deuticke, Wien, 1908. 4. Freud. "Der Inhalt der Psychose," Freud's Shriften zur angewandten Seelenkunde. Deuticke, 1908. 5. Jung. "Diagnostische Associationsstudien," Band I. Barth, Leipzig, 1906. 6. —— ——. "Die Psychologische Diagnose des Thatbestandes." Carl Marhold, Halle, 1906.

1. Freud. "Die Traumdeutung," II Auflage. Deuticke, Wien, 1909.

2. —— ——. "Sammlung kleiner Schriften zur Neurosenlehre," Band I & II. Deuticke, Wien.

3. —— ——. "Analyse der Phobie eines 5 jahrigen Knaben," Jahrbuch für Psychoanalytische u. Psychopathologische Forschungen , Band I. Deuticke, Wien, 1908.

4. Freud. "Der Inhalt der Psychose," Freud's Shriften zur angewandten Seelenkunde. Deuticke, 1908.

5. Jung. "Diagnostische Associationsstudien," Band I. Barth, Leipzig, 1906.

6. —— ——. "Die Psychologische Diagnose des Thatbestandes." Carl Marhold, Halle, 1906.
zh:
另一方面，一個因神經症而表現出被誇大之神經質天賦的兒童，可能會受到過度關切的家長催促。例如，在目前這個案例中，要讚賞、刺激並過早發展孩子對學習的熱切渴望，從而養成一種不自然的厭世狀態和掩蓋神經症的早熟，是多麼容易且誘人的事！在這種情況下，父母必須處理好自己的情結與情結傾向，不應以犧牲孩子為代價來從中獲利。應該徹底摒棄那種認為孩子應受父母束縛，或是他們是父母玩具的想法。他們是獨特而全新的生命。在性知識的啟蒙方面，可以斷言，人們普遍抱持一種先入為主的觀念，認為真相是有害的。許多神經學家認為，即使是成年人，對其自身性心理過程的啟蒙也是有害的，甚至是不道德的。難道同樣這些人會拒絕承認生殖器本身的存在嗎？

然而，我們不應從這種過度拘謹的極端走向另一個極端，即不計代價的啟蒙，這可能既愚蠢又令人不悅。在這件事上，我認為非常謹慎是可取的；不過，如果孩子們自己想到了某個念頭，他們不應該比成年人受到更多的欺騙。

女士們、先生們，我希望我已經向你們展示了精神分析研究在兒童身上所揭示的複雜心理過程，以及這些過程對於兒童的心理健康以及整體心理發展有多麼重大的意義。我未能展示的是這些觀察的普遍有效性。不幸的是，我無法證明這一點，因為我自己也不知道其中有多少是普遍有效的。只有通過累積此類觀察，並進一步深入探討所提出的問題，我們才能全面洞察心理發展的規律。令人遺憾的是，我們目前距離這個目標仍然很遠。但我滿懷信心地希望，教育工作者和實踐心理學家，無論是醫生還是深思熟慮的父母，不會在這個極其重要且有趣的領域中，讓我們長時間得不到協助。

文獻

1. 弗洛伊德。《夢的解析》，第二版。Deuticke，維也納，1909年。
2. —— ——。《神經症學說短文集》，第一、二卷。Deuticke，維也納。
3. —— ——。《對一名五歲男童恐懼症的分析》，《精神分析與精神病理學研究年鑑》，第一卷。Deuticke，維也納，1908年。
4. 弗洛伊德。《精神病的內容》，弗洛伊德應用心理學文集。Deuticke，1908年。
5. 榮格。《診斷性聯想研究》，第一卷。Barth，萊比錫，1906年。
6. —— ——。《事實情況的心理學診斷》。Carl Marhold，哈勒，1906年。
